ticket.subject: Unexpected $349 charge on May invoice - plan should be $99 Business tier
ticket.body: I'm seeing a $349 charge on my May statement, but our account dashboard shows we're subscribed to the Business plan at $99/month. The invoice breaks down as: 'API rate limit increase $120', 'Premium support tier $80', and 'Data export fee $50'. We haven't requested any of these upgrades or services. Can you explain these charges or process a refund for the overages?
